description: Fix the RL engine model ID mangling so recommendations are actually routed — not silently discarded

specs.description: extract_model_from_action returns the native provider/model format
specs.then: Returns 'meta-llama/llama-4-maverick' (slash preserved, no openrouter- prefix mangling)

domain_conventions.format: OpenRouter model IDs use 'provider/model' format — the slash is meaningful and must be preserved
domain_conventions.inference_rs: inference.rs routing matches on p.models_json.contains(requested_model) which requires the exact ID

specs.description: RL-recommended model successfully routes through inference.rs to a registered provider
specs.given: RL engine returns action 'model:openrouter:meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free|context:balanced' and a matching openrouter provider is registered
specs.when: select_model() is called and the result is passed to call_inference_endpoint
specs.then: inference.rs matches the model to the registered provider and returns a successful response (source=rl-engine in logs)

specs.description: Coder agent reports RL outcome after each code generation phase
specs.given: A coder agent completes a code generation step (success or failure)
specs.then: report_outcome is called with the task type, success flag, cost_usd, and duration_ms so the Q-table is updated

domain_conventions.note: Currently select_from_yaml bypasses RL entirely — coder should still report outcomes even when using YAML-selected models to build a baseline dataset

specs.description: Non-OpenRouter RL action variants (model:opus, model:haiku) still resolve correctly
specs.then: Returns 'claude-opus-4-6' (existing anthropic model mapping is preserved)

specs.description: Unknown action falls back to the task-type default — never returns a mangled ID
specs.given: An RL action string with no model directive ('context:conservative')
specs.then: Returns the current default for Reasoning ('meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free'), not a stale 'google/gemini-*' reference

domain_conventions.stale_tests: Two unit tests assert google/gemini-2.0-flash-001 which was the old default before the free-tier migration — these must be updated

specs.description: Mangled openrouter- IDs must NOT be passed to inference.rs
specs.given: The RL engine recommends any OpenRouter model
specs.when: The model ID flows from select_model() through the pipeline to inference routing
specs.then: At no point does a string matching /^openrouter-[a-z]/ appear in the model field sent to /api/inference/complete

domain_conventions.prior_bug: extract_model_from_action was converting 'meta-llama/llama-4-maverick' → 'openrouter-meta-llama-llama-4-maverick' via format!("openrouter-{}", or_id.replace('/', "-"))
